description: Splits a mixed holiday weekend special into separate Saturday, Sunday, and Monday one-offs.
combinedText: Join us for Easter this weekend! We will be open regular hours, and are offering a delicious Turkey Dinner Special this weekend; with your choice of Coconut Cream or Lemon Cream Pie for $32 + tax. Available from 4pm onwards on Saturday, and all day Sunday & Monday. Takeout options are available.

specials.name: Easter Special - Turkey Dinner with Choice of Pie
specials.description: Easter special: Turkey Dinner with your choice of Coconut Cream or Lemon Cream Pie for $32 + tax. Available from 4pm onwards on Saturday, and all day Sunday & Monday. Takeout options available.

description: Does not split a weekend special when every weekday in the clause shares the same timing signature.
combinedText: Weekend special: fish and chips for $18. Available all day Saturday & Sunday.
